Quick query to find orders by a specific customer:

```sql
SELECT o.order_id, o.total, o.created_at
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE c.email = '[EMAIL]'
  AND c.phone = '[PHONE]'
  AND c.address LIKE '%[ADDRESS]%[ADDRESS][SECRET]'
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;
```
